title: Sweet Dreams (Are Made of This)
meaning_summary: Sweet Dreams still earns at high catalog scale because it remains one of the most instantly recognizable songs of the synth-pop era.
revenue_drivers: The song performs strongly on 1980s, synth-pop, and crossover nostalgia playlists.
Its hook and sonic identity make it unusually sync-friendly.
Writer-side participation strengthens retained catalog value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes global playlist longevity, strong media reuse, and durable cross-generational replay.

ownership.publishing_owner: writer / publisher split with strong creator participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out song position
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public split of recording and publishing receipts.
